prerequisites: Network access to https://whiskyhunter.net so the connector can reach the public REST API over HTTPS.
No account, API key, or other credentials are required: the Whisky Hunter API is publicly accessible and this connector defines no secret fields.
No additional configuration is required: this connector is manifest-only and defines no config fields.

authMethods.name: No authentication
authMethods.summary: The Whisky Hunter API is a public, read-only REST API that requires no credentials. This connector declares no secret fields, so there is nothing to supply. Requests to endpoints such as /api/distilleries_info/ and /api/auctions_data/ return JSON over HTTPS without any API key, token, or login.

setupSteps.title: Confirm the API is reachable
setupSteps.body: Verify outbound HTTPS access to https://whiskyhunter.net. The connector reads from public endpoints under https://whiskyhunter.net/api/ (for example /api/distilleries_info/, /api/auctions_data/, and /api/distillery_data/<slug>/), all of which return JSON without authentication.

setupSteps.title: Add the connector
setupSteps.body: Select the Whisky Hunter source in pm. Because the connector is manifest-only with no secret fields and no config fields, there are no credentials to enter and nothing to configure; the source is ready once added.

setupSteps.title: Run a sync
setupSteps.body: Trigger a sync to pull historical whisky auction statistics (distillery information and aggregated auction data such as winning bid mean, trading volume, and lot counts) from the public API.

sources.title: Whisky Hunter distilleries_info endpoint (public, no auth, verified)
Whisky Hunter auctions_data endpoint (public, no auth, verified)
WhiskyHunter Public API directory entry (states no API key required)
